fundamentals.name: Snowflake Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Snowflake Inc. provides a cloud-based data platform for various organizations in the United States and internationally. The company's platform includes artificial intelligence (AI) Data Cloud, which enables customers to consolidate data into a single source of truth to drive meaningful business insights, build data applications, and share data and data products, as well as applies AI for solving business problems. It serves financial services, advertising, media and entertainment, retail and consumer goods, healthcare and life sciences, manufacturing, technology, telecom, travel and hospitality, and government and defense industries, as well as the public sector. the company has a collaboration with OpenAI, L.L.C. for the development of AI solutions for joint enterprise customers that deliver tangible return on investment. The company was formerly known as Snowflake Computing, Inc. and changed its name to Snowflake Inc. in April 2019. Snowflake Inc. was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Menlo Park, California.

judgment.summary: High-growth cloud data company with strong revenue expansion and free cash flow, but still unprofitable on an operating basis and trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 21.9% (0.39 vs 0.32); next earnings date is 2026-08-26.
positives: Revenue growth 30.1% YoY — robust expansion in the cloud data sector.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.59B — strong cash generation supports operations and investment.
Analyst growth est, current FY 43.5% — significant future growth expected.
negatives: Forward P/E 98.52x — valuation is extremely high, pricing in substantial future growth.
Operating margin -33.2% and Profit margin -28.4% — the company is not yet profitable on an operating basis.
Return on equity -53.9% and Return on assets -9.9% — significant losses relative to equity and assets.
Debt/Equity 142.46% — leverage is substantial, though offset by strong cash flow.
Mean analyst target $229.14 — currently below the spot price, suggesting some analysts are bearish.

news.paragraph: Snowflake shares are surging today following a strong Q1 earnings beat and a significant multi-year AI partnership with Amazon Web Services (AWS), reportedly worth $6 billion. The company's CEO highlighted Q1 as an AI "inflection point," and analysts are now suggesting Snowflake could be valued as an "AI winner." This news has propelled the stock to reclaim its 200-day moving average for the first time in four months.

headlines.title: Snowflake AWS AI Pact And Q1 Beat Shift Valuation Debate
Snowflake Explodes 37% on $6 Billion Amazon Deal as CEO Calls Q1 an AI "Inflection Point"
Snowflake Stock Soars After Q1 Double Beat, AWS AI Partnership Expansion
SNOW Stock Set To Reclaim 200-DMA For First Time In 4 Months - Analyst Says Snowflake Could Start Trading Like An ‘AI Winner’
Snowflake shares soar in premarket after AI momentum fuels strong Q1 beat (SNOW)
